calculation.value: proficiencyBonus

Initiative Swap. Immediately after you roll Initiative, you can swap your Initiative with the Initiative of one willing ally in the same combat. You can't make this swap if you or the ally has the Incapacitated condition.
Elven Accuracy. Whenever you have advantage on an attack roll, you can reroll one of the dice once.

features.name: Heavy Weapon Mastery
features.description: When you hit a creature with a weapon that has the Heavy property as part of the Attack action on your turn, you can cause the weapon to deal extra damage to the target. The extra damage equals your Proficiency Bonus.

calculation.value: proficiencyBonus

features.name: Hew
features.description: Immediately after you score a Critical Hit with a Melee weapon or reduce a creature to 0 Hit Points with one, you can make one attack with the same weapon as a Bonus Action.

calculation.value: Great Weapon Master - Hew. Immediately after you score a Critical Hit with a Melee weapon or reduce a creature to 0 Hit Points with one, you can make one attack with the same weapon as a Bonus Action.

features.name: Damage Reduction
features.description: When you're hit by an attack while you're wearing Heavy armor, any Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage dealt to you by that attack is reduced by an amount equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

actions.name: Get Advantage
actions.description: When you roll a d20 for a D20 Test, you can spend 1 Luck Point to give yourself Advantage on the roll.

buff.description: You have Advantage on your D20 Test.

actions.name: Give Disadvantage
actions.description: When a creature rolls a d20 for an attack roll against you, you can spend 1 Luck Point to impose Disadvantage on that roll.

debuff.description: Creature has Disdvantage on attack roll against you.

features.name: Concentration Breaker
features.description: When you damage a creature that is concentrating, it has Disadvantage on the saving throw it makes to maintain Concentration.

calculation.value: Mage Slayer - Concentration Breaker. When you damage a creature that is concentrating, it has Disadvantage on the saving throw it makes to maintain Concentration.

features.name: Guarded Mind
features.description: If you fail an Intelligence, a Wisdom, or a Charisma saving throw, you can cause yourself to succeed instead. Once you use this benefit, you can't use it again until you finish a Short or Long Rest.

actions.name: Guarded Mind

features.name: Metamagic Adept
features.description:
You've learned how to exert your will on your spells to alter how they function:

- You learn two Metamagic options of your choice from the sorcerer class. You can use only one Metamagic option on a spell when you cast it, unless the option says otherwise. Whenever you reach a level that grants the Ability Score Improvement feature, you can replace one of these Metamagic options with another one from the sorcerer class.

- You gain 2 sorcery points to spend on Metamagic (these points are added to any sorcery points you have from another source but can be used only on Metamagic). You regain all spent sorcery points when you finish a long rest.

calculation.value: sorceryPointsMetamagicAdept

features.name: Mystic Conflux
features.description:
Half Feat: Increase your INT, WIS, or CHA score by 1 to a maximum of 20.

You can now be attuned to an additonal magical item. Other attunement limitations still apply. The additional item must be of the common, uncommon, or rare rarity.

features.name: Guardian
features.description: Immediately after a creature within 5 feet of you takes the Disengage action or hits a target other than you with an attack, you can make an Opportunity Attack against that creature.

calculation.value: Sentinel - Guardian. Immediately after a creature within 5 feet of you takes the Disengage action or hits a target other than you with an attack, you can make an Opportunity Attack against that creature.

features.name: Halt
features.description: When you hit a creature with an Opportunity Attack, the creature's Speed becomes 0 for the rest of the current turn.

calculation.value: Sentinel - Halt. When you hit a creature with an Opportunity Attack, the creature's Speed becomes 0 for the rest of the current turn.

features.name: Minor Telekinesis
features.description: You learn the Mage Hand spell. You can cast it without Verbal or Somatic components, you can make the spectral hand Invisible, and its range increases by 30 feet when you cast it. The spell's spellcasting ability is the ability increased by this feat.

calculation.value: Minor Telekinesis. You learn the Mage Hand spell. You can cast it without Verbal or Somatic components, you can make the spectral hand Invisible, and its range increases by 30 feet when you cast it. The spell's spellcasting ability is the ability increased by this feat.

features.name: Telekinetic Shove
features.description: As a Bonus Action, you can telekinetically shove one creature you can see within 30 feet of yourself. When you do so, the target must succeed on a Strength saving throw (DC 8 plus the ability modifier of the score increased by this feat and your Proficiency Bonus) or be moved 5 feet toward or away from you.

actions.name: Telekinetic Shove
actions.description: As a Bonus Action, you can telekinetically shove one creature you can see within 30 feet of yourself. When you do so, the target must succeed on a Strength saving throw (DC 8 plus the ability modifier of the score increased by this feat and your Proficiency Bonus) or be moved 5 feet toward or away from you.

debuff.description: Creature is moved 5 feet toward or away from you.

features.name: War Caster
features.description: You have Advantage on Constitution saving throws that you make to maintain Concentration.

calculation.value: War Caster. You have Advantage on Constitution saving throws that you make to maintain Concentration.

features.name: Reactive Spell
features.description: When a creature provokes an Opportunity Attack from you by leaving your reach, you can take a Reaction to cast a spell at the creature rather than making an Opportunity Attack. The spell must have a casting time of one action and must target only that creature.

calculation.value: War Caster - Reactive Spell. When a creature provokes an Opportunity Attack from you by leaving your reach, you can take a Reaction to cast a spell at the creature rather than making an Opportunity Attack. The spell must have a casting time of one action and must target only that creature.

features.name: Somatic Components
features.description: You can perform the Somatic components of spells even when you have weapons or a Shield in one or both hands.

calculation.value: War Caster - Somatic Components. You can perform the Somatic components of spells even when you have weapons or a Shield in one or both hands.
